# Republic Studio - Production Waves\n\n**Republic is developed in Production Waves, not versions or chapters.**\n\nEach Wave builds invisible, then visible, then interconnected, then autonomous, then multiplayer, then polished.\n\n## The Wave Structure\n\n```\nWAVE 0: FOUNDATION          Invisible infrastructure\nWAVE 1: SIMULATION CORE     The world lives without a player\nWAVE 2: DECISION INTERFACE  The player has an office\nWAVE 3: EMERGENCE & DEPTH   Every choice matters and echoes\nWAVE 4: INTELLIGENCE & AI   The world doesn't need you to survive\nWAVE 5: MULTIPLAYER         Politics becomes personal\nWAVE 6: PRESENTATION        The world looks like leadership\n```\n\n## Wave 0: FOUNDATION\n\n**Objective**: Build nothing visible. Only architecture.\n\n**Duration**: 2-3 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ Project Bootstrap & Build Pipeline\n- ✓ Folder Structure & Organization\n- ✓ Logging System\n- ✓ Configuration Manager\n- ✓ Save System (framework)\n- ✓ Event Bus (decoupled communication)\n- ✓ Time Engine (60 tick/second)\n- ✓ Simulation Core (deterministic stepping)\n- ✓ Dependency Injection Container\n- ✓ Game Loop (update → render → repeat)\n\n**Outcome**: Project builds without warnings. Core systems framework in place. No player-facing features. Zero UI. Ready for simulation systems.\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"The skeleton works\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 0 - Foundation`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 1: SIMULATION CORE\n\n**Objective**: Build the world without presentation.\n\n**Duration**: 3-4 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ World Manager (entity lifecycle)\n- ✓ Country Entity (nation data model)\n- ✓ Geography System (terrain, resources, regions)\n- ✓ Population System (demographic simulation)\n- ✓ Resources System (supply and demand)\n- ✓ Currency System (economic foundation)\n- ✓ Economic Engine (production, trade, consumption)\n- ✓ Political System (government types, legitimacy)\n- ✓ Time-Driven Events (triggers based on simulation)\n- ✓ Interconnected Systems (education affects jobs, etc)\n\n**Outcome**: Functional simulation running 24/7. Detailed and complex economics. Countries evolve independently. Still no UI or player interaction. **The world is alive without anyone watching**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"The world lives without a player\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 1 - Simulation Core`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 2: DECISION INTERFACE\n\n**Objective**: Build how players make decisions.\n\n**Duration**: 4-6 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ Executive Workspace (main player hub)\n- ✓ Decision Spaces (specialized environments)\n- ✓ Advisor System (ministers bring proposals)\n- ✓ Cabinet Interface (team of advisors)\n- ✓ Reports System (analytics, trends, history)\n- ✓ Communication System (phone calls, emails, visitors)\n- ✓ Information Dashboards (key metrics at a glance)\n- ✓ Briefing Rooms (specialized decision areas)\n- ✓ Notification System (alerts and updates)\n- ✓ Save/Load UI (player can persist progress)\n\n**Outcome**: Player can see their nation's status. Player can influence decisions. Simulation responds to player input. Decision spaces feel immersive. **The player has an office**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"The player has an office\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 2 - Decision Interface`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 3: EMERGENCE & DEPTH\n\n**Objective**: Build interconnected consequences.\n\n**Duration**: 6-8 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ Legislative System (laws reshape society)\n- ✓ Faction System (political factions with interests)\n- ✓ Approval/Legitimacy System (power requires mandate)\n- ✓ Diplomatic Relations (treaties, alliances, conflicts)\n- ✓ Military System (forces, strategy, warfare)\n- ✓ Trade Networks (international commerce)\n- ✓ Crisis System (wars, recessions, disasters)\n- ✓ Succession System (what happens after you leave)\n- ✓ Constitutional System (rules that constrain power)\n- ✓ Media System (public opinion shaped by spin)\n\n**Outcome**: Every decision creates winners and losers. Effects cascade through interconnected systems. Long-term consequences become visible. Multiple strategies work (but differently). **Every choice matters and echoes**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"Every choice matters and echoes\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 3 - Emergence & Depth`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 4: INTELLIGENCE & AUTONOMY\n\n**Objective**: Build thinking players (AI).\n\n**Duration**: 4-6 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ AI Decision Engine (nations make strategic choices)\n- ✓ Economic AI (agents optimize resources)\n- ✓ Political AI (factions pursue interests)\n- ✓ Military AI (strategic warfare decisions)\n- ✓ Diplomatic AI (relationship building, betrayal)\n- ✓ Advisor Personalities (advisors with agendas)\n- ✓ Emergent Storytelling (AI creates narratives)\n- ✓ Opposition System (political rivals plot)\n- ✓ International Crises (AI triggers cascading events)\n- ✓ Adaptive Difficulty (AI adjusts to player style)\n\n**Outcome**: World feels alive and responsive. Other nations act autonomously. Political intrigue happens without player. Advisors have conflicting agendas. **The world doesn't need you to survive**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"The world doesn't need you to survive\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 4 - Intelligence & Autonomy`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 5: MULTIPLAYER & EMERGENCE\n\n**Objective**: Build multiplayer politics.\n\n**Duration**: 4-6 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ Network Protocol (deterministic networking)\n- ✓ Server Architecture (persistent world)\n- ✓ State Synchronization (all players see same world)\n- ✓ Player Sessions (join/leave/resume)\n- ✓ Conflict Resolution (turn ordering, action resolution)\n- ✓ Emergent Diplomacy (player-to-player politics)\n- ✓ Alliance System (multiple players can ally)\n- ✓ Trading System (player nations trade)\n- ✓ Espionage System (player spies on players)\n- ✓ Co-op and Competitive Modes\n\n**Outcome**: Multiple players influence same world. Political intrigue becomes personal. Alliances form and break. Betrayal and redemption happen. **Politics becomes personal**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"Politics becomes personal\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 5 - Multiplayer & Emergence`\n\n---\n\n## Wave 6: PRESENTATION & POLISH\n\n**Objective**: Build what you see.\n\n**Duration**: 4-6 weeks\n\n**Systems Delivered**:\n- ✓ 3D Office Environment (fully explorable)\n- ✓ Character Animation (people move naturally)\n- ✓ Visual Effects (decisions create visual feedback)\n- ✓ Audio System (ambient, music, voice acting)\n- ✓ Cinematics (story moments, transitions)\n- ✓ Tutorial System (onboarding for complexity)\n- ✓ Accessibility (colorblind modes, text size, etc)\n- ✓ Performance Optimization (60 FPS consistently)\n- ✓ Quality Assurance (bug fixes, polish)\n- ✓ Release Polish (menu, settings, options)\n\n**Outcome**: Beautiful, polished game world. Immersive presentation of deep systems. Accessible to diverse players. Performs smoothly on target hardware. **The world looks like leadership**\n\n**Milestone Gate**: \"The world looks like leadership\"\n\n**GitHub Project Board**: `Wave 6 - Presentation & Polish`\n\n---\n\n## Wave Progression Philosophy\n\n### Each Wave is Shippable\nEven though we don't release at each wave, each wave represents a complete, coherent layer.\n\n### Each Wave Builds on Previous\nCannot skip waves. Each wave uses the foundation of all previous waves.\n\n### Each Wave Reuses Previous Code\nNo rewriting. Each wave enhances, extends, and optimizes existing systems.\n\n### Production Waves != Release Strategy\nWaves define **production strategy**, not **release dates**. Each wave is a **milestone of completion**.\n\n---\n\n## Assigning Issues to Waves\n\nEvery issue gets a Wave label and is added to the corresponding Wave project board.\n\nLabels:\n- `Wave-0-Foundation`\n- `Wave-1-Simulation`\n- `Wave-2-Interface`\n- `Wave-3-Emergence`\n- `Wave-4-Intelligence`\n- `Wave-5-Multiplayer`\n- `Wave-6-Presentation`\n\n---\n\n*Production Waves: Invisible → Alive → Interfaced → Consequential → Autonomous → Multiplayer → Beautiful*\n"
